foods_to_eat: Chicken soup, citrus fruits, ginger, garlic, honey, broth, warm herbal teas
foods_to_avoid: Ice cream, cold beverages, dairy (mucus), processed foods, alcohol
meal_plan: Breakfast: Oatmeal with honey and ginger tea. Lunch: Chicken vegetable soup. Dinner: Steamed rice with garlic broth. Snacks: Orange, warm lemon water.
hydration: 8-10 glasses warm water daily. Ginger tea 3x daily.
supplements: Vitamin C 500mg, Zinc 10mg, Vitamin D 1000 IU
